statement: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle. Speed clause split out on 2026-04-20 into rational_kan_hz_pstack_speed_regime_20260420.

n_a8216d81.content: Prove: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_a8216d81.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.

n_a01b2262.content: Phase 1: Exact network and oracle lane. Build a degree>=8, hidden>=10 exact-rational KAN with pure Fraction forward/backward/update traces and a reproducible SB-grid training task.
n_a01b2262.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_a01b2262.outcome_reason: Implemented exact degree-8 hidden-10 RationalKANDeg8 oracle lane in projects/rational_kan_hz/src/rkan_hz/rkan_pstack_training.py with exact Fraction forward/backward/update semantics and network_spec emission.

n_51faa265.content: Phase 0: Reuse map and claim audit. Verify which existing rkan_hz and Hybrid Zeckendorf surfaces are reusable, and record the exact dishonest shortcuts to forbid before implementation starts.
n_51faa265.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_51faa265.outcome_reason: Reuse map and imported-brief claim audit completed in WIP/rational_kan_hz_pstack_in_loop_pm_instructions_2026-04-20.md. Honest boundary frozen: current normal-equation and surrogate speed lanes are insufficient for in-loop parity claims.

n_8e9ef424.content: Phase 4: Network-scale speed benchmark and paper-run integration. Measure dense vs P-stack inference on the trained degree>=8, hidden>=10 network with CI on CPU and CUDA, then join the artifact into rkan_paper_run without rerunning.
n_8e9ef424.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_8e9ef424.outcome_reason: Split out on 2026-04-20 into rational_kan_hz_pstack_speed_regime_20260420. Evidence at time of split: update-lane mean speedup 0.07126 CI95 [0.07012, 0.07241]; inference-lane mean 0.92862 CI95 [0.77436, 1.07393]; microbatch sweep m in {1..128} monotone improving from 0.0214 to 0.0805 with no crossover; width sweep w in {10..500} at operand-magnitude 1e5-1e6 monotone decreasing; T1.5 dictionary lane at 10M features crosses 44.17x independently. Conjecture-level Name-Content Drift resolved by narrowing this conjecture to parity+scale and carrying the speed clause into its own ledger entry.

n_05b6d049.content: Phase 2: P-stack in-the-loop substrate. Wire FlatHybridNumber/batch_readout/active-set dispatch into the actual forward and backward accumulator path without changing the mathematical update rule.
n_05b6d049.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_05b6d049.outcome_reason: Implemented a real Hybrid Zeckendorf backend via bench/hybrid_zeckendorf/src/bin/pstack_exact_accumulate.rs and wired it into forward/backward exact accumulation groups through a persistent worker.

n_3372de3c.content: Phase 3: Bit-identical parity suite. Prove by executable witness that forward activations, backward gradients, and parameter trajectories match the Fraction oracle exactly over multi-step training.
n_3372de3c.goal_before: HZ P-stack in-the-loop at KAN degree >= 8 and hidden width >= 10: exact Fraction forward/backward/update parity against the Fraction oracle plus positive inference speedup CI on the trained network.
n_3372de3c.outcome_reason: Parity suite closes on the implemented surface: projects/rational_kan_hz/tests/test_pstack_in_loop.py plus artifacts/.../pstack_in_loop/bitwise_parity_log.jsonl record exact tensor equality for forward/backward/update.
